search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:appliancesdwanstatistics" $orgid$ | stats avg(merakiVpnPeers{}.latencySummaries{}.avgLatencyMs) as Average_Latency | eval "Average Latency" = round(Average_Latency, 3)." ms" | table "Average Latency"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:appliancesdwanstatistics" $orgid$ | stats avg(merakiVpnPeers{}.lossPercentageSummaries{}.avgLossPercentage) as Average_Loss | eval "Average Loss" = round(Average_Loss, 3)." %" | table "Average Loss"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:appliancesdwanstatistics" $orgid$ | rename networkId as "Network ID", networkName as "Network Name", merakiVpnPeers{}.networkId as "Peer VPN Network ID" , merakiVpnPeers{}.networkName as "Peer VPN Network Name", merakiVpnPeers{}.usageSummary.receivedInKilobytes as "Received Kilobytes", merakiVpnPeers{}.usageSummary.sentInKilobytes as "Sent Kilobytes" | table "Network ID", "Network Name","Peer VPN Network ID" ,"Peer VPN Network Name","Received Kilobytes", "Sent Kilobytes"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:appliancesdwanstatistics" $orgid$ | rename merakiVpnPeers{}.jitterSummaries{}.senderUplink as "Sender Uplink", merakiVpnPeers{}.jitterSummaries{}.receiverUplink as "Receiver Uplink" | stats avg(merakiVpnPeers{}.jitterSummaries{}.avgJitter) as Average_Jitter by "Sender Uplink", "Receiver Uplink" | eval "Average Jitter"=round(Average_Jitter,2) | table "Sender Uplink", "Receiver Uplink", "Average Jitter"
